description_long: This object consists of a pair of tall, rectangular, matte gray pots, each containing a cluster of upright, pointed green leaves resembling those of an aloe or agave plant. The pots are filled with small, white decorative stones that cover the soil surface, providing a clean and modern aesthetic. The leaves are thick, fleshy, and have a slightly serrated edge, typical of many succulent species. The pots have a smooth, unadorned finish with sharp, clean edges, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary style. The overall appearance is well-suited for urban environments, such as office lobbies, building entrances, or modern patios. No visible plant identification tags or decorative patterns are present on the pots.
description: A pair of tall, matte gray rectangular pots with upright green succulent leaves and white decorative stones, featuring a minimalist modern design.
description_view_0: Two rectangular gray pots with pointed green leaves and white stones, viewed from the side, showing both pots in parallel.
description_view_1: A single pot viewed from the front, highlighting the dense cluster of green leaves and the clean, straight edges of the pot.
description_view_2: Both pots are visible from the opposite side, with the leaves' spread and the white stones clearly shown.
description_view_3: A single pot viewed from the back, focusing on the broad surface of the pot and the arrangement of the leaves.
